architecture_inspirations.name: SQLite application file format
architecture_inspirations.takeaway: Use a portable local SQL index as a machine-readable pack artifact.

architecture_inspirations.name: DuckDB
architecture_inspirations.takeaway: Evaluate later for local analytics if SQLite index scans outgrow simple query needs.

architecture_inspirations.name: GraphRAG
architecture_inspirations.takeaway: Produce graph-ready dependency edges now; defer LLM-backed graph summarization behind owner gate.

architecture_inspirations.name: DataHub
architecture_inspirations.takeaway: Data Atlas should evolve toward ownership, discovery, governance, observability, and lineage.

next_research_gate: Promote ATLAS_INDEX.sqlite to persistent Data Atlas SQLite spine after pack builder is stable.
